name: mt-ai
description: Use Codex to read and operate MT-AI through the local Canvas Agent MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Use Codex to operate the current MT-AI board.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to the local Canvas Agent MCP server so Codex can inspect the current MT-AI board, create nodes, connect flows, and trigger generation through the web canvas confirmation flow.
defaultPrompt: 读取当前画布并总结节点结构
根据选中节点创建一组生图提示词
